description: Verify Docker container builds and responds with 200 before deploy

checks.name: docker-health
checks.label: Docker Health Check
checks.description: Build Docker image, run container, verify HTTP 200 response
checks.pass: curl localhost:3000 returns HTTP 200 AND body does not contain error strings

failure.userMessage: Docker container did not respond with HTTP 200. This may be a false alarm if the container is warming up. Check the container logs.
